current_ko: 한 턴에 한 번, 메인 액션 전·후로 이그제큐티브 액션 1.

Main action, you can take 1 Executive
action.

Cost: 4 Crystals
Develop Tech once at no
cost.

current_ko: 비용: 크리스탈 4 — 로버 최대 2칸 이동(크리스탈/테크 가능).
ocr_en:
Cost: 4 Crystals
Move your Rover up to 2
spaces - you may spend
Crystals and/or use Tech.

Cost: 3 Crystals
Upgrade a a Building tile.

current_ko: 비용: 크리스탈 2 — 봇들 이동력 최대 2(크리스탈로 추가).

Cost: 2 Crystals Use up to 2
Movement points to move
your Bots. You may spend
Crystals to gain additional MP.

Cost: 2 Crystals
Take 1 Resource from the
Warehouse.

current_ko: 비용: 크리스탈 2 또는 일치 과학자 — 고급 건물 액션 사용.

Cost: 2 Crystals or a
matching Scientist Use an
Advanced Building action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 정상 규칙대로 건물 1 업그레이드(테크 가능). 부스트마다: 1회 추가.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Upgrade 1 1 Building following normal rules. May
use Tech. For each Boost: perform 1 additional upgrade.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 광산 1 건설(콤플렉스라면 테크). 부스트마다: 테크 +1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Construct a Mine following normal rules. Tech
1 required if creating or increasing a Complex. For each Boost: Gain 1
additional level of Tech for this construction action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 자기 광산/고급 건물이 자원·크리스탈 1에 일치하면 한 번 더 생산. 부스트마다: 추가 생산 1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Each of your Mines/Advanced Buildings produces
1 matching Resource/Crystal. For each Boost: one of those Mines/Advanced
Buildings produces once more.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 발전기 1 건설(콤플렉스라면 테크). 부스트마다: 테크 +1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Construct a a Generator following normal rules.
Tech required if creating or increasing a Complex. For each Boost: Gain 1
additional level of Tech for this construction action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 우주선 환영. 식물 1·물 1로 콜로니스트 2+봇 1 또는 콜로니스트 3. 부스트마다: 우주선 1 추가.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Welcome 1 1 Ship. It costs 1 Plant and 1 Water and
brings 2 Colonists and 1 Bot or 3 3 Colonists. For each Boost: Welcome 1
additional Ship for the same costs and rewards.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 수자원 추출기 1 건설. 부스트마다: 테크 +1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Construct a Water Extractor following normal
rules. Tech required if creating or increasing a Complex. For each Boost: Gain
1 additional level of Tech for this construction action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 창고에서 자원/크리스탈 1. 부스트마다: 추가 1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Take 1 Crystal or 1 Resource from the Warehouse.
For each Boost: Take 1 additional Resource or Crystal from the Warehouse.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 그린하우스 1 건설. 부스트마다: 테크 +1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Construct a Greenhouse following normal rules. a
Tech required if creating or increasing a a Complex. For each Boost: Gain 1
additional level of Tech for this construction action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 테크 그리드에서 정상 비용으로 테크 1. 부스트마다: 테크 1 추가.
ocr_en:
Building Action: Take 1 Tech tile from the Tech Grid, as per normal Advanced 1
Alles. For each Boost: Take 1 1 additional Tech tile.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 산소 응축기 1 건설. 부스트마다: 테크 +1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Construct an Oxygen Condenser following normal
rules. Tech required if creating or increasing a Complex. For each Boost: Gain
additional level of Tech for this construction action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 크리스탈 2. 부스트마다: 추가 1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Gain 2 2 Crystals. For each Boost: Gain 1 additional
Crystal.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 셸터 1 건설. 부스트마다: 테크 +1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Construct a a Shelter following normal rules. Tech
required if creating or increasing a a Complex. For each Boost: Gain 1 1
additional level of Tech for this construction action.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 디스플레이에서 정상 비용으로 지구 계약 1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Take 1 Contract from the display, paying the
cost.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 카드 위에 발견 타일을 둠. 가져갈 때 보너스+게임 종료까지 카드 액션 재사용.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Place one of the Discovery tiles from the
Exploration space onto this card. Gain the benefit of of the tile. For the rest of
the game, the Action of of this card is to gain that benefit.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 맵 어디든 건물 1 업그레이드(자기 봇 무관).
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Upgrade a Building anywhere on the map (the
building zone of your Bots is is unlimited for this action).

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 자기 테크 타일 최대 2장 발전(정상 비용). 부스트마다: 1장 추가.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Develop 1 1 of your Tech tiles up to 2 times or 2
Tech tiles one time each, paying normal costs. For each Boost: develop a
Tech one additional time, paying normal costs.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 자기 거주구역으로 콜로니스트 최대 2.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Move up to 2 Colonists from your Working area to
your Living Quarters.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 궤도 액션 칸·콜로니의 자기 콜로니스트를 거주구역으로.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Return some or or all of your Colonists from Action
slots in Orbit or on the Colony to your Living Quarters. Warehouse.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 저장고에서 자원 1을 지불하고 비-광물 자원 2를 공급처에서. 부스트마다: 자원 1 추가.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Spend 1 Resource from your Storage and take any
2 non-mineral Resources from the general supply. For each Boost: take 1
additional Resource.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 이동력 2로 자기 로버 이동(크리스탈, 연구·발견 타일 회수). 부스트마다: 이동력 1.
ocr_en:
dvanced Action: to 2 Movement to move Building Spend up points your
Bots as if they were Rovers (collecting Crystals, Research tiles and Discovery
tiles). For each Boost: Take 1 1 additional Movement point.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 메인 액션 전 궤도로 이동해 평소 이동 단계, 이후 메인 액션.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Travel to Orbit, performing the travel steps as
normal. If you do this before your Main action, perform your Main action in
Orbit.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 청사진 1. 부스트마다: 추가 1.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Take 1 1 Blueprint. For each Boost: Take 1 more
Blueprint.

current_ko: 고급 건물 액션: 자기 로버를 (현재 보드의 자기 로버 테크 최고 레벨)만큼 칸 이동. 부스트마다: 1칸 추가.
ocr_en:
Advanced Building Action: Move your Rover a a number of of hexes up up to the
highest level of Rover Tech in play. For each Boost: Move it it 1 additional hex.
